ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Removal Of Trustee; Accounting; Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Breach Of Trust And Fiduciary Duty
Off Calendar Mar-10-2021 Continued To May-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bradley Kass appeared by zoom for Eamon Corry (Petitioner).
Ciarin O'Sullivan appeared by zoom for Bernard Corry.
Maureen McFadden appeared by zoom for Bernard Corry.
John Stein appeared by zoom for Colleen Kellison and Jennifer Corry (Objectors).

The Court raised the issue of venue. Mr. Kass stated that the notice of administration showed venue in San Francisco, that the Administrator lives in Millbrae, that Mr. O'Sullivan informed him that his Client passed away this morning, and requested a 60-day continuance. Mr. O'Sullivan stated that he filed a demurrer yesterday with a hearing date of May 13, 2021 and that a 90-day continuance seems more appropriate. Ms. McFadden stated that she filed a petition for return of trust property yesterday with a hearing date of May 17, 2021. Mr. Kass stated that he presumes his petition will go forward, but he does not know who the Trustee will be and suggested putting all of the petitions on hold for now. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. and the Petition for Return of Trust Property are continued to May 19, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
